Top-rated Russian-speaking realtors in the San Francisco Bay Area include Lily Garipova (SF), Yurii Lavrentiev (South Bay/general), Luba Kharchenko (Gilroy/South Bay), Oleg Verbitski (SF), and Lana Tsarikaeva (Compass). These agents are recognized for their market knowledge, dedicated service, and ability to assist with buying or selling homes in Russian.
